name: Prefer Structured Concurrency Over Callbacks
description: Use async/await instead of completion handlers for asynchronous code.

name: Avoid Force Unwrapping
description: Force unwrapping (!) crashes at runtime if the optional is nil. Use guard/if-let or nil coalescing.
auto_fix_hint: Replace ! with guard let, if let, or ?? with a safe default

examples.good:
guard let text = textField.text, let amount = Double(text) else { return }
guard let cell = tableView.dequeueReusableCell(withIdentifier: "Cell") else { return }

name: Use Value Types for Data Models
description: Prefer structs over classes for data models unless you need reference semantics or inheritance.
auto_fix_hint: Change class to struct for pure data models

name: Explicit Access Control
description: All types, properties, and methods should have explicit access control modifiers (private, internal, public).

name: Avoid Retain Cycles with Weak References
description: Closures capturing self in reference types must use [weak self] or [unowned self] to prevent memory leaks.
auto_fix_hint: Add [weak self] to the closure capture list, then guard let self = self else { return }
